original_image_tags: A scanned page of an off-white, aged document with two hole-punches at the bottom. The page is largely blank, with visible creases and faint markings. At the top, there is a faint purple ink stamp and a handwritten number in pink or red ink. Faint, mirrored text bleed-through is visible from the reverse side.

elements.description: A faded purple ink stamp reading 'NCLOSURE' at the top center, with handwritten pink numbers '62-83 894-102' below it. Two black punch holes are visible near the bottom edge. The rest of the page is blank.

judge.reason: Both agree on the presence of a stamp and two punch holes, but B provides specific text for the stamp and numbers while A leaves these vague, which is a detail addition rather than a contradiction.
